not_found_message: The page you are looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.
error_auth_config_desc: The authentication system is not properly configured. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
error_auth_desc: Your session has expired or you need to log in to view this page.
error_access_desc: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this resource.
error_network_desc: It looks like you're offline. Please check your internet connection.
error_server_desc: Our internal systems are having trouble. We've been notified.
error_unexpected_desc: An unknown error occurred. We're looking into it.
profile_avatar_hint: PNG, JPG, GIF or WebP, up to 5 MB
home_hero_subtitle: A production-ready React 19 boilerplate powered by Feature-Sliced Design, GraphQL, and OIDC authentication.
home_feature_fsd_desc: Scalable architecture for serious frontend teams.
home_feature_vite_desc: Blazing fast build times and latest React features.
home_feature_graphql_desc: Type-safe data fetching with auto-generated hooks.
home_feature_typing_desc: TypeScript everywhere. No any, strict null checks.
home_counter_hint: State persists across navigation but resets on refresh.
home_error_sim_hint: This will intentionally throw an error to test the fallback UI.
counter_toast_desc: New value has been set to {value}
